title: Fmag_Force Status
notes: Fmag_Force returns the resultant force of the subject axes specified by Fmag_Axes in the force coordinate system specified by CoordinateSystem.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Monitor

Fmag_PeakForce Status
examples:
Function Test_Fmag_Force Real rVar FSet FCS1.Position, 0, 0, 100 FSet FCS1.Orientation, FG_TOOL FSet FM1.ForceSensor, 1 FSet FM1.CoordinateSystem, FCS1 FSet FM1.Fmag_Axes, FG_XY FGet FM1.Fmag_Force, rVar Print rVar
Fend
